critical_failures.title: Brief instructions rendered as page content
critical_failures.description: The build tool treated the brief text as literal content rather than a generation prompt. H1 tags contain the brief's opening instruction. Text elements contain numbered section descriptions. H3 elements contain brief fragments.

critical_failures.title: Both pages have identical structure despite different briefs
critical_failures.description: Both pages produced identical 7-section scaffolding: hero, social-proof-bar, problem, solution-features, testimonials, details, final-cta. 100% structural overlap. Landing requested 8 distinct sections, service requested 6 different sections.

critical_failures.title: No real content generated — only scaffolding labels
critical_failures.description: Section headings are generic labels ('Social Proof Bar', 'Problem', 'Solution Features', 'Details', 'Final Cta'). Body text is placeholder: 'Use this section to support the [name] narrative for the page.' No conversion copy, no brand messaging.

critical_failures.title: Zero content images on either page
critical_failures.description: Only image is header logo from template. Build tool did not invoke search-stock-images or import-stock-image. Hero image element has empty src.

critical_failures.title: Site style memory not configured — no brand ground truth
critical_failures.description: get-site-style-memory returns status:not_configured. reuse_design_system:true has no stored colors, CTA text, fonts, or style DNA to consume.

contrast_issues.element: Hero H1 text on dark background
contrast_issues.detail: H1 color rgb(51,65,85) on hero bg rgb(30,58,95) — low contrast, estimated ~1.5:1. Fails WCAG AA.
contrast_issues.note: The heading is styled with the default dark text color on a dark hero background. The text appears very faint in screenshots.

headings: H1: Build a modern, conversion-focused landing page...
H1: Build a content-rich service detail page

mobile_padding_issues: All sections use 120px padding — no mobile overrides, excessive whitespace
responsive.mobile_stats: 4th stat column clips at 478px on landing page

what_works_well: Header/footer template inheritance works correctly on generated pages
Responsive framework basics: hamburger menu, section stacking, text reflow
No horizontal overflow at any viewport
Fast performance: DCL under 1.5s, DOM complete under 2.5s, ~38KB transfer
ACSS color variables used for section backgrounds
Hero section has dark gradient background visual treatment
All sections have admin labels for builder UX
Polish score improved to 100 after design loop

recommendations.title: Build tool must use brief as a generation prompt, not literal content
recommendations.impact: Fixes the single largest quality gap — everything else is moot if the brief is rendered as content

recommendations.title: Generate unique section structures per brief instead of reusing a single template
recommendations.impact: Would produce structurally distinct pages matching requested section types

recommendations.title: Generate real headlines, body copy, and CTA text from brief intent and site context
recommendations.impact: Would produce conversion-ready content instead of scaffolding labels

recommendations.title: Auto-invoke search-stock-images and import-stock-image during builds
Require setup-design-system or update-site-style-memory before build with reuse_design_system:true
recommendations.impact: Ensures brand colors, CTA text, and fonts available for builds

recommendations.title: Vary section padding for visual rhythm — not all 120px
Set explicit tablet/mobile padding overrides (80px tablet, 48-64px mobile)
recommendations.impact: Prevents excessive whitespace on small screens

recommendations.title: Add brief-as-content detection check at build time
recommendations.impact: Catches most visible content generation failure

recommendations.title: Use ACSS section spacing classes instead of hardcoded padding
Return brief_fidelity_score in build results measuring content-to-brief alignment
recommendations.impact: Signals caller to re-run or adjust before publishing

recommendations.title: Reconcile design score discrepancy (build reports 25/29, validate returns 0/1)
recommendations.impact: Accurate quality signals for automated workflows

recommendations.title: Warn when site_style_memory is not configured and reuse_design_system is true
recommendations.impact: Prevents silent fallback to generic styling
